title: UPI achieves nearly 23 billion transactions in March: DFS
summary: Transaction through the Unified Payments Interface (UPI) touched a record high of 22.64 billion in volume terms in March. In volume terms, 22.64 billion transactions were carried during the month as compared to 18.3 billion a year ago, posting a growth of 24%.
